acceptance_criteria: The validation gate records passing evidence in status/readiness.json.
completion_signals: Validation evidence is recorded under eval/history and linked from status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Validation reports schema or contract failures that the current task scope cannot resolve safely.
tasks.summary: Run the build-pack validation command and capture readiness evidence.

acceptance_criteria: Inherited benchmark gates update from not_run to pass or waived.
completion_signals: The inherited benchmark command records results in eval/latest/index.json.
Required benchmark gates advance to pass or waived in status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Benchmark output fails to update readiness or eval state through the existing bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Run the inherited benchmark command after validation passes.
